items.label: Forms with React Hook Form + Zod

api/hooks.title: TanStack Query Hooks API Reference
api/hooks.description: Complete reference for all TanStack Query (React Query) hooks used in the AgriTech Platform for data fetching, caching, and mutations.

api/satellite-api.title: Satellite Service API Reference
api/satellite-api.description: Complete API reference for the AgriTech Platform Satellite Indices Service, which provides vegetation analysis using Google Earth Engine and Sentinel-2 imagery.

api/supabase-functions.title: Supabase Functions API Reference
api/supabase-functions.description: Complete reference for Supabase Edge Functions and RPC (Remote Procedure Call) database functions used in the AgriTech Platform.

architecture/backend.title: Backend Architecture
architecture/backend.description: Backend services, API design, authentication flow, and service integration

architecture/database.title: Database Architecture
architecture/database.description: Database architecture, schema design, RLS policies, and data modeling principles

architecture/frontend.title: Frontend Architecture
architecture/frontend.description: Frontend architecture, React component structure, routing patterns, and state management

architecture/multi-tenancy.title: Multi-Tenancy Architecture
architecture/multi-tenancy.description: Detailed explanation of the multi-tenant architecture, role hierarchy, and context management

architecture/overview.title: Architecture Overview
architecture/overview.description: System architecture, technology stack, and component overview of the AgriTech Platform

architecture/satellite-service.title: Satellite Service Architecture
architecture/satellite-service.description: Satellite service architecture, Google Earth Engine integration, vegetation indices, and cloud masking strategy

contributing.title: Contributing Guide
contributing.description: Thank you for your interest in contributing to the AgriTech Platform! This guide will help you get started with contributing to the project.

database/functions.title: Database Functions
database/functions.description: PostgreSQL functions and RPC endpoints for business logic in the AgriTech Platform.

database/migrations.title: Database Migrations
database/migrations.description: This document covers the complete workflow for creating, testing, and deploying database migrations in the AgriTech Platform.

database/rls-policies.title: Row Level Security (RLS) Policies
database/rls-policies.description: This document covers Row Level Security implementation in the AgriTech Platform, ensuring multi-tenant data isolation and role-based access control.

database/schema.title: Database Schema
database/schema.description: This document provides a comprehensive overview of the AgriTech Platform database schema, including all tables, relationships, and Entity Relationship Diagrams (ERD).

database/triggers.title: Database Triggers
database/triggers.description: Database triggers for automatic data validation, calculation, and integrity in the AgriTech Platform.

database/type-generation.title: TypeScript Type Generation
database/type-generation.description: Generating TypeScript types from PostgreSQL database schema for type-safe database access.

deployment/environment-variables.title: Environment Variables
deployment/environment-variables.description: Complete reference for all environment variables used in the AgriTech Platform.

deployment/monitoring.title: Monitoring and Observability
deployment/monitoring.description: Comprehensive guide for monitoring the AgriTech Platform in production.

deployment/production.title: Production Deployment
deployment/production.description: Comprehensive guide for deploying the AgriTech Platform to production.

deployment/staging.title: Staging Environment
deployment/staging.description: Guide for setting up and maintaining a staging environment for the AgriTech Platform.

development/coding-standards.title: Coding Standards
development/coding-standards.description: This document outlines the coding standards and best practices for the AgriTech Platform codebase.

development/debugging.title: Debugging Guide
development/debugging.description: Comprehensive guide to debugging the AgriTech Platform during development.

development/git-workflow.title: Git Workflow
development/git-workflow.description: This document describes the Git workflow and branching strategy used in the AgriTech Platform project.

development/performance.title: Performance Optimization
development/performance.description: Guide to optimizing performance in the AgriTech Platform.

development/testing-strategy.title: Testing Strategy
development/testing-strategy.description: This document outlines the comprehensive testing strategy for the AgriTech Platform.

features/billing-cycle.title: Billing Cycle: Quotes, Orders, and Bills
features/billing-cycle.description: The AgriTech Platform implements a complete billing cycle for both sales and purchases, enabling professional quotation, order management, and invoicing workflows.

features/production-intelligence-data-fl.title: Production Intelligence - Data Flow & Population
features/production-intelligence-data-fl.description: This document explains how the Production Intelligence dashboard gets populated with data across all four core tables.

frontend/authentication.title: Authentication
frontend/authentication.description: The AgriTech Platform uses Supabase Auth integrated with a custom multi-tenant authentication provider for comprehensive user authentication and context management.

frontend/authorization.title: Authorization
frontend/authorization.description: The AgriTech Platform uses a two-layer authorization system: CASL for fine-grained permissions with subscription enforcement, and RoleBasedAccess for simpler database-backed permission checks.

frontend/components.title: Components
frontend/components.description: The AgriTech Platform organizes components by feature and reusability, with a clear separation between UI primitives and business logic components.

frontend/forms.title: Forms with React Hook Form + Zod
frontend/forms.description: The AgriTech Platform uses React Hook Form v7+ with Zod validation for type-safe, performant forms with minimal re-renders.

frontend/internationalization.title: Internationalization (i18n)
frontend/internationalization.description: The AgriTech Platform supports multiple languages using react-i18next with full RTL (Right-to-Left) support for Arabic.

frontend/routing.title: Routing with TanStack Router
frontend/routing.description: The AgriTech Platform uses TanStack Router v1 for file-based routing with automatic code splitting and type-safe navigation.

frontend/state-management.title: State Management
frontend/state-management.description: The AgriTech Platform uses a dual state management approach: TanStack Query for server state and Jotai for global client state.

frontend/styling.title: Styling
frontend/styling.description: The AgriTech Platform uses Tailwind CSS as its primary styling solution, with custom components, dark mode support, and responsive design utilities.

frontend/tech-stack.title: Frontend Tech Stack
frontend/tech-stack.description: The AgriTech Platform frontend is built with modern web technologies, optimized for performance, developer experience, and scalability.

getting-started/environment-setup.title: Environment Setup
getting-started/environment-setup.description: This guide covers detailed environment variable configuration for both development and production environments.

getting-started/first-deployment.title: First Deployment
getting-started/first-deployment.description: This guide walks you through deploying the AgriTech Platform to production for the first time. We'll cover setting up Supabase, deploying the satellite service, and configuring the frontend.

getting-started/installation.title: Installation
getting-started/installation.description: This guide will help you set up your development environment for the AgriTech Platform. Follow these steps to install all necessary prerequisites.

getting-started/quick-start.title: Quick Start
getting-started/quick-start.description: This guide will help you get the AgriTech Platform up and running on your local machine in just a few minutes.

guides/adding-feature.title: Adding a Complete Feature
guides/adding-feature.description: This comprehensive guide walks you through adding a complete feature to the AgriTech Platform, from database schema to frontend UI, using a real-world example.

guides/adding-new-route.title: Adding a New Route
guides/adding-new-route.description: This guide walks you through adding a new route to the AgriTech Platform using TanStack Router's file-based routing system.

guides/creating-component.title: Creating Components
guides/creating-component.description: This guide covers how to create reusable components in the AgriTech Platform, including proper organization, TypeScript typing, styling with Tailwind CSS, and integration with the UI component library.

guides/database-migration.title: Database Migration Guide
guides/database-migration.description: This guide covers the complete workflow for creating and managing database migrations in the AgriTech Platform using Supabase.

guides/deployment.title: Deployment Guide
guides/deployment.description: This comprehensive guide covers deploying the AgriTech Platform to production, including frontend, backend satellite service, database migrations, and environment configuration.

guides/satellite-integration.title: Satellite Integration Guide
guides/satellite-integration.description: This guide explains how to integrate with the satellite-indices-service to add vegetation analysis, heatmaps, and satellite imagery features to your AgriTech Platform components.

guides/testing.title: Testing Guide
guides/testing.description: This comprehensive guide covers testing strategies for the AgriTech Platform, including unit tests with Vitest, end-to-end tests with Playwright, and testing patterns for React components, hooks, and API integrations.

intro.title: AgriTech Platform Documentation
intro.description: Welcome to the AgriTech Platform documentation! This comprehensive agricultural technology platform combines multi-tenant architecture, satellite data analysis via Google Earth Engine, and AI-powered insights to revolutionize farm management.

testing/tax-calculations.title: Tax Calculations Testing Guide
testing/tax-calculations.description: This guide provides comprehensive test scenarios for validating the tax calculation system in the AgriTech Platform accounting module.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting Guide
troubleshooting.description: This guide covers common issues you may encounter while developing or deploying the AgriTech Platform and their solutions.
